info.title: Logging Schema
info.description: Schema for diagnostic log upload payloads.

uploadId.description: Unique identifier for one uploaded log zip.

sourceLogFilename.description: Original text log filename selected by the user.

zipFilename.description: Filename of the uploaded log zip stored in Firebase Storage.

storagePath.description: Firebase Storage object path for the uploaded zip

deviceId.description: Resolved device identifier for the uploader device.

uploaderDriverUid.description: Driver UID for the user who initiated this upload.

sizeInBytes.description: Final uploaded zip size in bytes, when available from Storage object metadata.

storageBucket.description: Firebase Storage bucket containing the uploaded zip.
